name: BeirГЈo (Beira Portuguese)
notes: BeirГЈo / Beira Portuguese (Beira Litoral: Coimbra, Aveiro; Beira Alta: Viseu, Guarda; Beira Baixa: Castelo Branco), a northern-central EP dialect. Cintra places the BeirГµes in the Baixo-Minhoto-Duriense-BeirГЈo group. MODELLED FEATURES: (1) APICO-ALVEOLAR-ONLY SIBILANT SYSTEM вЂ” the 'famous' s beirГЈo: вџЁs/ssвџ© AND вџЁc/Г§/zвџ© all realise as apico-alveolar [sМє]/[zМє] (Cintra 1971 pp.88, 93 вЂ” the most palatalised apical variant is 'vulgarmente conhecida pelo nome de s beirГЈo'; ГЃlvarez PГ©rez 2014 pp.37-38, BeirГµes 'kept only the apico-alveolar branch'; PГ©rez notes the apical core is clearest in the districts of Viseu, Guarda and Castelo Branco). Coda вџЁs/zвџ© keep chiado [Кѓ]/[К’]. (2) BETACISM вЂ” /v/вЂ“/b/ merged to /b/ ~ [ОІ]; PГ©rez 2014 pp.35-37 documents an extensive bilabial-merger area in the eastern districts of Guarda and Castelo Branco that Cintra's original map omitted. A conservative alveolar rhotic (trill [r]) is enumerated as a variant of /КЃ/. Inherits pt-PT base.

sources.author: Vasconcelos, J.L. de
sources.title: Esquisse d'une dialectologie portugaise
sources.notes: Classical dialectological survey; Beira section foundational

sources.author: Cintra, L. F. Lindley
sources.title: Nova proposta de classificaГ§ГЈo dos dialectos galego-portugueses
sources.notes: Foundational EP dialect classification. p.93: the Baixo-Minhoto-Duriense-Beirao group reduces the archaic four-sibilant system to two apico-alveolar sibilants [sМє zМє]; p.88: /v/-/b/ merger and apico-alveolar sibilants are diagnostic northern features.

sources.author: ГЃlvarez PГ©rez, XosГ© Afonso
sources.title: European Portuguese dialectal features: a comparison with Cintra's proposal
sources.notes: ALEPG-corpus quantitative reassessment. pp.37-38: Baixo-Minhotos, Durienses and BeirГµes 'kept only the apico-alveolar branch' (both s/ss and c/Г§/z merge to apical), vs the conservative four-sibilant Transmontano/Alto-Minhoto. pp.35-37: /b/-/v/ merger extends along the coast beyond Coimbra and through the eastern districts (Guarda, Castelo Branco).

stress.notes: Acordo OrtogrГЎfico 1990 conventions: paroxytone default; written accents override; final -i/-u/-r/-l/-z/-x/-im/-om/-um/-ns and nasal diphthongs attract final stress. Unmarked -em/-am stay paroxytone (homem, falam).
